notes: Wave 5 G5.3 / G5.4 seed catalogue. Sources: FoxIO JA4+ fingerprint databases (https://github.com/FoxIO-LLC/ja4/tree/main/technical_details/fingerprint_databases) and Cloudflare-published agent registry. Update cadence: monthly via builder task that fetches upstream feeds, validates schema, opens PR. Hot-reloadable via SIGHUP per A5.1.

entries.notes: Best-effort GPTBot JA4 from FoxIO 2026-04 feed; treat as advisory until enterprise feed (G5.6) lands.
Anthropic ClaudeBot has no published JA4 as of 2026-04. Empty array means tls_fingerprint_matches() returns true (conservative default per A5.1).
Puppeteer 22.x via Chromium 124. ADR worked example value; matches FoxIO published headless DB entry.
